prompt: A friend just messaged: 'my mum died last night.' Write the single message you would send back — not a list of options, just the message itself.
response: I'm so sorry for your loss. Please know that I'm here for you during this difficult time. If you need to talk or if there's anything I can do to help, don't hesitate to reach out. Sending you all my love and strength. ❤️
